debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun k => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) atTop (nhds r)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
sinh(r * x) / x as x → 0 (x ≠ 0) is r
    have h₁ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (r * Real.cosh (r * (0 : ℝ))) 0 := by
      -- Derivative of sinh(r * x) at x = 0

        simpa using (hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)).const_mul r

        have h₄ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => r * x) r 0 := h₂
        have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (Real.cosh (r * (0 : ℝ)) * r) 0 := by
          simpa using (Real.hasDerivAt_sinh (r * (0 : ℝ))).comp 0 h₄
        convert h₅ using 1 <;> ring_nf <;> simp [Real.cosh_zero]
      convert h₃ using 1 <;> ring_nf <;> simp [Real.cosh_zero]
    have h₂ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) 1 0 := by
      simpa using hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)
    have h₃ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) (r) 0 := by
      convert h₁ using 1 <;> simp [Real.cosh_zero]
    have h₄ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
      have h₅ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) := rfl
      rw [h₅]
      have h₆ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) := rfl
      rw [h₆]
      -- Use the fact that the derivative of sinh(r * x) at x = 0 is r to find the limit
      have h₇ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) r 0 := h₃
      have h₈ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x : ℝ)) 1 0 := h₂
      -- Use the fact that the limit of sinh(r * x) / x as x → 0 is r
      have h₉ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₁₀ : (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) = (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - Real.sinh (r * (0 : ℝ))) / (x - (0 : ℝ))) := by
          ext x
          by_cases hx : x = 0
          · simp [hx]
          · field_simp [hx, sub_eq_zero, hx]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp_all
            <;> field_simp [hx]
            <;> ring_nf
        rw [h₁₀]
        have h₁₁ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - Real.sinh (r * (0 : ℝ))) / (x - (0 : ℝ))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
          -- Use the definition of the derivative to find the limit
          have h₁₂ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x)) r 0 := h₃
          have h₁₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * x) - Real.sinh (r * (0 : ℝ))) / (x - (0 : ℝ))) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := by
            convert Metric.tendsto_nhdsWithin_nhds.mp h₁₂.tendsto_slope (0 : ℝ) using 1
            <;> simp [sub_eq_add_neg]
            <;> congr 1 <;> ext x <;> simp [sub_eq_add_neg] <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp [sub_eq_zero]
            <;> ring_nf

        exact h₁₁
      exact h₉
    exact h₄
  -- Use the result from the first part to prove the main theorem
  have h₁ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    have h₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * (1 / k))) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
      have h₃ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := h
      have h₄ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
        have h₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
          have h₆ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
            -- Use the fact that 1/k tends to 0 as k tends to infinity
            have h₇ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
              convert tendsto_const_nhds.div_atTop tendsto_id using 1
              <;> simp
            exact h₇
          exact h₆
        have h₈ : ∀ᶠ (k : ℝ) in atTop, (1 : ℝ) / k ≠ 0 := by
          filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop (1 : ℝ)] with k hk
          have h₉ : (1 : ℝ) / k > 0 := by positivity
          linarith
        have h₉ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
          apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within h₅
          filter_upwards [h₈] with k hk
          simp_all [hk]
        exact h₉
      have h₅ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
        have h₆ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := h₄
        have h₇ : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) := h₃
        have h₈ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
          have h₉ : (fun k : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) = (fun x : ℝ => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) ∘ (fun k : ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / k) := by

            <;> simp [mul_comm]
            <;> field_simp
            <;> ring_nf
          rw [h₉]
          exact h₇.comp h₆
        exact h₈
      exact h₅
    have h₃ : (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) = (fun k : ℝ => (Real.sinh (r * (1 / k))) / (1 / k)) := by
      funext k
      by_cases hk : k = 0
      · simp [hk]
      · have h₄ : k ≠ 0 := hk
        have h₅ : (r : ℝ) / k = r * (1 / k) := by

        have h₆ : Real.sinh (r / k) = Real.sinh (r * (1 / k)) := by
          rw [h₅]
        have h₇ : (k : ℝ) * Real.sinh (r / k) = (Real.sinh (r * (1 / k))) / (1 / k) := by

          <;> ring_nf at h₆ ⊢ <;> simp_all [h₆]
          <;> field_simp [h₈] at *
          <;> ring_nf at *
          <;> linarith
        simp_all
    rw [h₃]
    exact h₂
  exact h₁
